zh.Widdington, Essex, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭艾可維丁頓
zh.Linsell, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可林瑟爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cowley於1440年出生在英國艾可林瑟爾時，她的父親Sir Cooley Cowley41歲，母親Annella de Rue60歲。她於1469年與Sir Robert Allgar在英國英格蘭艾可維丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年12月21日在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Cowley于1440年出生在英国艾可林瑟爾时，她的父亲Sir Cooley Cowley41岁，母亲Annella de Rue60岁。她于1469年与Sir Robert Allgar在英国英格兰艾可維丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年12月21日在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cowley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Cowley. One in Gloucestershire is named with Old English cū ‘cow’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; two in Derbyshire have Old English col ‘(char)coal’ as the first element; and one near London is from Old English cofa ‘shelter, bay’ (see Cove ) or the personal name Cofa. The largest group, however, with examples in Buckinghamshire, Devon, Oxfordshire, and Staffordshire, were apparently named as ‘the wood or clearing of Cufa’; however, in view of the number of places called with this element, it is possible that it conceals a topographic term as well as a personal name.
Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Amhlaoibh ‘son of Amhlaoibh’ (a Gaelicized form of Old Norse Óláfr). For an alternative Manx form of the same patronymic see Callow .

variants.name: Coley
meanings: English (Midlands): nickname for a swarthy person, from Middle English coly ‘coaly, coal-black’. The original short vowel is retained in the 16th century colly ‘dirtied with coal and soot’. Alternatively, a variant of Cowley .
Probably an Americanized form of Swiss German   Kohli   or   Kohler  .

variants.name: Cove
meanings: habitational name from a place called (the) Cove, examples of which are found in Hampshire, Wilts (a minor name in Leigh), Devon, and Suffolk, all from Old English cofa, which is recorded in literary sources with the sense ‘enclosed chamber’ but in placenames probably with extended senses such as ‘shelter, hut, building’, ‘hollow’ (in the case of the Devon name), and ‘creek, inlet’ (in the case of the Suffolk name).
nickname from Middle English cof, cove ‘eager, bold, courageous’ (Old English cāf).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cowley was born in 1440, in Lindsell, Essex, England, her father, Sir Cooley Cowley, was 41 and her mother, Annella de Rue, was 60. She married Sir Robert Allgar in 1469, in Widdington, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 21 December 1505, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Cowley est née en 1440, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Cooley Cowley, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Annella de Rue, avait 60 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Allgar en 1469, à Widdington, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1505, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Cowley 1440 in Lindsell, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Cooley Cowley 41 und ihre Mutter Annella de Rue 60. Sie hat 1469 in Widdington, Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Allgar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1505 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cowley è nata il nel 1440 nel Lindsell, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir Cooley Cowley, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Annella de Rue, aveva 60 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Allgar nel 1469, nel Widdington, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1505, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Cowleyが1440年にイギリスエセックスリンドセルで生まれた時，父Sir Cooley Cowleyは41歳，母Annella de Rueは60歳であった。1469年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィッドイントンでSir Robert Allgarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年12月21日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cowley(이)가 1440년 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Cooley Cowley(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annella de Rue(은)는 60세였다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위딩턴에서 Sir Robert Allgar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 12월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cowley nasceu em 1440, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Cooley Cowley, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Annella de Rue, tinha 60 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Allgar em 1469, em Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1505, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cowley родилась в 1440 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Cooley Cowley было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Annella de Rue, 60. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Allgar в 1469 г. в местности виддингтон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 декабря 1505 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Cowley nació en 1440, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Cooley Cowley, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Annella de Rue, tenía 60 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Allgar en 1469, en Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1505, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
